title: Alinta Energy Retail Sales Pty Ltd — Consumer harm
investigation_objective: Paid $1,089,000 in AER penalties (a record 15 infringement notices) for allegedly overcharging Centrepay customers (a government bill-paying service for Centrelink recipients) across NSW, Qld and SA between 2019-2024, and failing to inform/refund them within required timeframes.
scope: Paid $1,089,000 in AER infringement notice penalties for alleged Centrepay overcharging and failure to timely inform/refund welfare-payment customers
